taskScope: Оперативная карта tab top-controls (Слои карты = 9 providers + 2 toggles, compact overflow, 2560 cap) plus the per-tab bottom panels via the TabBottomPanel dispatcher: map (filters · cloud-base legend · data actions) and the bar Маршруты panel/toolbar pixel-fitted to the designer reference crops (10px switch labels, 14px action labels, Blueprint-blue pills, barometric legend, rail-state 1920 chrome caps, weather tiers, date-only bar dates); routes + telemetry baselines refreshed for the bar pixel-fit (telemetry: interim 100px compact date width until I6)
references: Figma per-tab block exports: Desktop/Work/Верхние блоки управления/*_общий блок.png and *_code.md (design source for sizing/colors)
Numeric spec: card #171d20 surface, #727677 1px outline, 2px radius, 16px padding, 30px controls, 24px #2970ff active segment

assertions: Each tab renders its TabTopControls toolbar above the map at the top of the workspace right column (toolbar y = 48px Header, toolbar x = map x). Verified for all six tabs in tests/e2e/top-controls.spec.ts.

Card sections use the #171d20 surface, #727677 1px outline, 2px radius, and 16px padding; titles are 12px/500 white; controls are 30px tall with 3px radius; the segmented Тип данных active pill is 24px on #2970ff.

The Тип данных group stays pinned right; at 1920 with the rail collapsed the cards fill the full toolbar width with no internal horizontal scroll and no overlap of the data-type group (the per-tab date/time card flexes; verified per tab in e2e). Below 1920 the chrome reflows: function-group icons and the map toggles fold into chevron overflow dropdowns and the bottom-panel filters collapse; the chrome caps at the 2560 content max while the map stays full-bleed (verified at 1280/1920/2560/3840 in tests/e2e/top-controls.spec.ts and workspace-shell.spec.ts).

The map toolbar (icon-heavy) keeps a cropped pixel baseline; the other tabs are covered by DOM/CSS metrics + e2e instead of a pixel baseline, because dense text labels (font anti-aliasing) and the 50px->300px panel motion make a cropped toolbar pixel-diff non-deterministic. Panel tabs align the toolbar to the 300px panel (e2e toolbar.x === 300).
The map function block renders 11 + 8 + 4 + 9 Blueprint icon buttons + 2 layer toggles; every glyph SVG loads and every icon button keeps an aria-label (e2e).
Map height/offset now account for the toolbar and the map-tab bottom panel; the frozen map gutter (10px), inner inset (8px), and radii (2px/4px) are unchanged (workspace-shell.spec.ts).

The per-tab bottom panels (TabBottomPanel dispatcher, data-testid=tab-bottom-panel) are fixed 96px footers reusing the frozen ControlCard surface: map (Фильтрация switches · Нижняя граница облаков rainbow legend · Управление данными actions) and bar (six filter switches with the space-driven second fold tier · Настройки карты select + Яндекс chip · barometric legend · target actions), pixel-fitted to the bar designer crops. The rainbow stops live only in _tokens.scss ($gradient-cloud-legend); panels only reduce the map height, leaving the right-anchored stage contract unchanged. Above 1920 the bar panel and toolbar freeze at their 1920-band width per rail state ($workspace-chrome-cap-rail-*).
Actual and diff artifacts stay under reports/visual-qa/.
